environment_reason: Sandbox egress policy returns 403 host_not_allowed for every model-inference provider AQUA routes to (OpenRouter, Groq, Google Gemini, Together) - verified empirically (evidence/egress-probes.txt). Provider API keys exist in the frozen build's .env but were deliberately NOT loaded: no endpoint is reachable, so loading them would only transit secrets through a denying proxy. A real-adapter execution attempt against the live frozen engine confirmed the failure point (evidence/engine-error-sample.txt; run 20260721-130720_gsm8k_aquiplex_connectivity-attempt, stamped INVALID).
